untranslatable_reason: The signal requires a custom 'quality_spread' indicator (AAA yield - BAA yield from Moody's corporate bond series) which is not available in the allowed indicators list. This is a macro/fixed-income indicator not present in the standard price/technical indicator set. The confirmation condition 'remains above 200-day SMA for minimum 5 consecutive days' and 'positive rate of change in spread over last 5 days' cannot be precisely expressed without access to the quality_spread data series.
translation_notes: Signal references Moody's corporate bond quality spread (AAA-BAA) which is external macro data. Standard backtest engines typically do not include fixed-income spread indicators. To implement: (1) obtain quality_spread data from Bloomberg/Federal Reserve FRED, (2) add as custom indicator, (3) apply conditions: crosses_above(quality_spread, sma_200), sustained above sma_200 for 5 bars, positive rate_of_change over 5-day period. Exit on crosses_below or 8% trailing stop.
